original_image_tags: Page shows several stamped markings and ink stamps at the bottom.

elements.description: A page displaying multiple overlapping ink stamps. Inverted legible text includes 'RECEIVED', 'P10 10 24 AM.', 'F.B.I. LABORATORY DIVISION', 'RECEIVED Sep 8 5 27 P.M. '47', 'RECEIVED-A460 24 PM '47', and 'S. DEPT of JUSTICE F B I'. A faint circular seal or stamp impression is visible near the top right edge.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on multiple overlapping ink stamps, but Description B adds specific quoted text not mentioned in A without contradiction.
